mismatched_invoices.reason: Supplier has not filed GSTR-1 for October 2024
mismatched_invoices.recommendation: Do not claim ITC. Follow up with supplier.

issues.description: Invoice issued to buyer whose GSTIN was cancelled 30 days before invoice date.
issues.impact: If reported as B2B, GSTN portal will reject or flag. Buyer cannot claim ITC regardless.
issues.agent_action_taken: Moved invoice from B2B section to B2CS in GSTR-1 draft.
issues.ca_action_required: Confirm reclassification. Inform Verma Traders they cannot claim ITC on this invoice.
issues.tax_impact: None — GST liability (₹5,400) unchanged. Revenue is still taxed.

issues.description: Supplier has not filed their October GSTR-1. Invoice absent from GSTR-2B.
issues.impact: ITC of ₹5,040 cannot be claimed this month without risk. If claimed and supplier never files, Mehta must reverse with 24% interest.
issues.agent_action_taken: Excluded from ITC in GSTR-3B draft (conservative strategy).
issues.ca_action_required: Decide: claim provisionally or defer? Call Dye Masters and request they file GSTR-1 before Nov 13.
issues.tax_impact: ₹5,040 additional cash payment needed if not claimed. Can be claimed next month if supplier files.

issues.hsn_5407_desc: Woven fabrics of synthetic filament yarn, incl. monofilament >= 67 decitex
issues.hsn_5208_desc: Woven fabrics of cotton, containing >= 85% cotton by weight, <= 200 g/m2
issues.description: Item name indicates cotton fabric, but HSN code 5407 is for synthetic fabric. Both are 12% GST, so no tax difference. However, wrong HSN in GSTR-1 can trigger scrutiny.
issues.impact: No immediate tax impact (both are 12%). Risk of GSTN notice for wrong HSN in annual return.
issues.agent_action_taken: Flagged in GSTR-1 draft with warning. Did not auto-correct as material classification requires human verification.
issues.ca_action_required: Confirm with Mehta whether item is cotton or synthetic. If cotton → change HSN to 5208 before filing.
issues.tax_impact: None — both HSN codes attract 12% GST.
